framework: A path qualifies only when >=3 prominent, proven people in the field visibly share the capability, each with a resolving link — the pattern across standouts is the evidence, not market demand. Ranked by strength of that pattern. Curated editorial, not DOL-derived.

paths.path: Own an end-to-end brand identity system
paths.what_it_is: Build and personally sign a complete visual identity system - logo, typography, environmental graphics - that an organization runs its whole brand on, not a one-off logo.
paths.why_it_signals: It proves you can build a visual system an organization is willing to run its whole brand on for years, not just deliver a one-off logo.

paths.path: Ship physical products end-to-end as a hybrid designer-engineer
paths.what_it_is: Take a physical product from sketch through engineering, materials and manufacturing yourself, rather than handing a rendering to an engineering team and stopping there.
paths.why_it_signals: It proves you can carry a design through engineering and manufacturing yourself — the difference between rendering a product and actually shipping one.

paths.path: Design a custom typeface or signature lettering system
paths.what_it_is: Draw original letterforms - a custom typeface, wordmark, or hand-lettering system - rather than only selecting and arranging existing fonts.
paths.why_it_signals: It proves original letterform craft precise enough that brands and publications commission it by name, not a generic design service.
